run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
Refactor session management and remove lease configuration

- Removed LeaseConfig from ServerConfig and related validation logic.
- Updated session handling to use SessionState for better encapsulation.
- Refactored session allocation to avoid using a BTreeMap for sessions, now using Arc<SessionState>.
- Simplified session heartbeat and cleanup logic.
- Adjusted API responses to reflect the removal of lease parameters.
- Updated frontend API types and views to remove lease configuration fields.
- Improved serial websocket handling with timeout management.
- Enhanced tests to cover new session management behavior.

run.display_title: Refactor session management and remove lease configuration

head_commit.message:
feat: add DTB management functionality

- Introduced DTB store in AppState to manage device tree binaries.
- Updated the web UI to include a new DTB management section with routes and views.
- Implemented API endpoints for listing, creating, updating, and deleting DTBs.
- Enhanced BoardEditorView to support DTB file uploads and automatic name filling.
- Created DtbView for managing existing DTBs, including renaming and replacing files.
- Updated backend to handle DTB file uploads and downloads associated with sessions.
- Added tests for new DTB functionalities in both frontend and backend.

run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
Refactor board run command and U-Boot integration

- Updated `ServerControlMessage` struct to make fields public for better accessibility.
- Enhanced `BoardRunArgs` to include configuration file paths and server details.
- Implemented `prepare_uboot_artifacts` function to handle U-Boot artifact preparation.
- Refactored `run_uboot` and `run_uboot_remote` methods in `Tool` to streamline U-Boot execution.
- Introduced `RunnerBackend` trait with `LocalBackend` and `RemoteBackend` implementations for better separation of concerns.
- Improved error handling and logging throughout the U-Boot execution process.
- Updated tests to reflect changes in command parsing and configuration handling.

run.display_title: Refactor board run command and U-Boot integration

head_commit.message:
refactor: remove unnecessary async/tokio usage

Remove tokio, futures, hyper, axum and related async dependencies.
The codebase was using async for operations that are fundamentally
synchronous (file I/O, config loading, serial terminal).

- Replace tokio::fs with std::fs
- Replace EventStream with crossterm::event::poll/read
- Replace reqwest with ureq for HTTP downloads
- Disable web feature in jkconfig by default

head_commit.message:
refactor: remove unnecessary async/tokio usage

Remove tokio, futures, hyper, axum and related async dependencies.
The codebase was using async for operations that are fundamentally
synchronous (file I/O, config loading, serial terminal).

- Replace tokio::fs with std::fs
- Replace EventStream with crossterm::event::poll/read
- Replace reqwest with ureq for HTTP downloads
- Disable web feature in jkconfig by default

head_commit.message:
refactor: remove unused board editor UI schema and JSON schema validation

- Deleted the boardEditorUiSchema.ts file as it is no longer needed.
- Removed jsonFormsAjv.ts which contained JSON schema validation logic.
- Eliminated BoardEditorJsonForms.render.test.ts as it is obsolete.
- Updated BoardEditorView and BoardEditorView.test.ts to use a new form state management approach.
- Refactored the BoardEditorView.vue to directly manage form state without JSON Forms.
- Adjusted BoardsView.vue to remove unnecessary name column from the board table.
- Modified SessionsView.vue to display board IDs instead of names.
- Enhanced error handling in the Rust backend for board type not found scenarios.

head_commit.message:
feat: add power management configuration to board settings

- Introduced `power_management` field in `BoardConfig` to support custom and relay-based power management.
- Implemented `PowerManagementConfig` enum with variants for `CustomPowerManagement` and `ZhongshengRelayPowerManagement`.
- Added functionality to execute power actions (on/off) based on the configured power management strategy.
- Updated the WebSocket serial interface to handle automatic power-on and power-off actions.
- Enhanced the board editor UI to include options for configuring power management settings.
- Added tests for power management functionality, including command execution and error handling.

run.display_title: feat: add power management configuration to board settings

run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
feat: refactor uboot-shell for async support and improve dependencies

- Updated Cargo.toml to include async dependencies: futures, tokio, tokio-serial, and tokio-util.
- Refactored example files (env_var.rs, loady.rs, loady_real.rs) to use async/await syntax.
- Modified UbootShell implementation to support async I/O operations.
- Updated YMODEM protocol implementation for async file transfers.
- Enhanced tests to utilize async functions and ensure compatibility with the new async structure.

run.display_title: feat: refactor uboot-shell for async support and improve dependencies

run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
feat(board): implement board client and session management

- Added `BoardServerClient` for interacting with the ostool-server API.
- Implemented session management with `BoardSession`, including heartbeat functionality.
- Created commands for listing available board types and running board sessions.
- Introduced a terminal interface for serial communication via WebSocket.
- Updated CLI to support new board commands and arguments.
- Added tests for the new functionality and ensured proper error handling.

run.display_title: feat(board): implement board client and session management

run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
feat: add TFTP network configuration and serial port discovery

- Introduced TftpNetworkConfig to ServerConfig for managing TFTP network settings.
- Implemented automatic detection of non-loopback network interfaces.
- Added functionality to list available serial ports and network interfaces.
- Updated BoardForm and ServerView to include TFTP network settings and serial port options.
- Enhanced TFTP status to report resolved server IP and netmask.
- Updated API client and types to support new endpoints for serial ports and network interfaces.
- Added tests for new functionalities and ensured backward compatibility with existing configurations.

run.display_title: feat: add TFTP network configuration and serial port discovery
